message:
test(fcp-conformance/mesh-trace-replay): pin TraceReplayInputFormat + TraceReplayDiff/Summary/Report + TraceReplayError data type contract (resolves flywheel_connectors-4p806)

17 tests pinning the data-type surface of the offline-debug
replay engine. The engine itself drives MeshNode + stores; this
file pins the cross-crate contracts every JSON/CBOR consumer of
replay output relies on.

- TraceReplayInputFormat: 3 distinct variants (Auto/Json/Cbor), Copy
  cheap-pass-by-value, snake_case serde wire form, rejects
  AUTO/yaml/json5/empty
- TraceReplayDiff: 5-field constructor preservation, serde identity
  roundtrip, PartialEq compares every field (index, event_type,
  expected_decision, actual_decision, detail), missing vs unexpected
  one-sided diffs distinct
- TraceReplaySummary: zero-default sanity, serde roundtrip preserves
  BTreeMap ordering (UI depends on stable ascending iteration)
- TraceReplayReport: full serde roundtrip identity, optional
  source_capturing_node, diffs vec serializes each entry
- TraceReplayError Display contract: 'trace IO error at <path>: <msg>'
  / 'failed to parse trace as <fmt>: <msg>' / 'trace capture
  unavailable' (operator log grep contract); std::error::Error trait
  bound

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
